envelope.raw_input: multi-tenant audit export service intermittently leaks cross-tenant records when async shard compaction overlaps resumable export pagination after failover; identify root cause, design a safe scoped fix, include rollback plan, verify tenant isolation with focused regression checks, and summarize residual risks
envelope.user_goal: Identify root cause of cross-tenant record leakage and design safe scoped fix including rollback and verification.

plan.objective: Identify root cause of cross-tenant record leakage in audit export service, design safe scoped fix with rollback, verify isolation, summarize risks

steps.instruction: Discover service architecture, compaction implementation, pagination state handling, and failover recovery paths for multi-tenant audit export service
Analyze overlap conditions between async shard compaction and resumable export pagination after failover for tenant isolation leaks
Design narrow mutation_scope, rollback_plan, verification_plan, and fix_design based on root cause evidence
Apply bounded mutation using mutation_scope and fix_design, consuming rollback_plan, output change_summary
Verify tenant isolation via focused regression checks using change_summary, mutation_scope, and root_cause_evidence; output verification artifacts
Summarize residual risks and produce final_report

plan.strategy: Phase-aware discovery-first sequencing to collect evidence before any mutation, followed by scoped design, bounded mutation, verification, and final summary
success_criteria: scoped fix applied with rollback available
